ksa_text: Ability to synthesize requirements from multiple regulatory frameworks and standards into coherent, non-duplicative governance controls that satisfy overlapping obligations without creating compliance conflicts.

Seniority appropriate: describes regulatory interpretation, compliance program execution, or governance oversight.
